criteriaCheck.AC8: satisfied - FIXED: new focusFieldInput() helper correctly focuses first input[name=fieldId] for radio/checkbox, day sub-input for date, and direct getElementById for all other types

buildStatus.frontendBuild: PASS - tsc + vite build with 0 errors
buildStatus.e2eTest: PASS - upload PDF, publish, GET /schema, POST /submit all return correct responses

accessibilityChecks.labelAssociations: All form field components use htmlFor/id pairing or fieldset/legend for grouped controls
accessibilityChecks.ariaDescribedBy: All error messages linked via aria-describedby on the affected input
accessibilityChecks.errorSummary: GOV.UK error summary pattern with role=alert, aria-labelledby, and programmatic focus on validation failure
accessibilityChecks.errorSummaryLinks: onClick handlers call element.focus() to satisfy WCAG 2.4.3 (Focus Order)
accessibilityChecks.keyboardNavigation: All inputs are native HTML form controls; no custom keyboard traps; skip link present; tab order follows DOM order
accessibilityChecks.colorContrast: GOV.UK frontend govuk-tag, govuk-error-message and panel components meet 4.5:1 contrast ratio
accessibilityChecks.screenReader: Error messages use aria-describedby; error summary uses role=alert for immediate announcement; loading state uses aria-busy=true and aria-live=polite

govukCompliance.pageStructure: GovLayout provides: skip link, govuk-header with service name, govuk-phase-banner (Beta), govuk-main-wrapper with id=main-content, govuk-footer
govukCompliance.fieldComponents: text input uses govuk-input; textarea uses govuk-textarea; date uses govuk-date-input pattern with day/month/year; number uses govuk-input with inputmode=numeric; radio uses govuk-radios; checkbox uses govuk-checkboxes; select uses govuk-select
govukCompliance.errorPattern: govuk-error-summary + govuk-error-message inline; govuk-form-group--error on field container
govukCompliance.confirmationPanel: govuk-panel govuk-panel--confirmation with h1 title and body containing reference number
govukCompliance.hintText: Required fields show govuk-hint with (required) text
govukCompliance.backLink: govuk-back-link to dashboard on form render page
govukCompliance.phaseBanner: Beta phase banner via GovLayout component

knownIssues: Radio and checkbox fields may show 'No options defined' if the extracted schema does not include options array - this is a graceful fallback and the schema extraction (sprint 01/02) may not always populate options
Date field error focuses on the 'day' sub-input which is the recommended GOV.UK pattern
The (required) hint text is nested inside the label - this is valid but some implementations place it outside the label; both approaches are acceptable per GOV.UK Design System
